## Context

The project has `AuthService` (`src/auth/auth-service.ts`) which uses Payload + JWT + PBKDF2 to authenticate users, but there are no Next.js App Router handlers at `src/app/api/auth/` exposing these to clients. Existing auth files in `src/api/auth/` (Pages Router style) use a separate `UserStore`/`SessionStore` — this task adds the Payload-based App Router routes per the task spec.

## Files to Create

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts` | `POST /api/auth/login` — validates, calls `AuthService.login()` |
| `src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts` | `POST /api/auth/register` — validates, creates Payload user, logs in |
| `tests/int/auth/login.test.ts` | Integration tests for login endpoint |
| `tests/int/auth/register.test.ts`… [+4393 chars]
